name: Career Intelligence Suite
description: AI-powered platform for career planning and resume optimization with role discovery, skill-gap analysis, 90-day roadmaps, and resume parsing.
bullets: Built FastAPI backend with 3-stage LLM pipeline (analysis, composition, QA) for resume optimization
Implemented OpenAI integration with retry logic and JSON repair for robust API calls
Developed Streamlit frontend with career discovery using embedding-based skill matching
Created multi-format resume parser supporting PDF, DOCX, TXT, and markdown files
Designed vector embedding system with cosine similarity search for role matching

name: Django E-Commerce Platform
description: Full-stack e-commerce platform with product catalog, cart management, payment integration, and order processing.
bullets: Developed scalable Django REST API with JWT authentication and role-based permissions
Implemented Celery task queue for async order processing and email notifications
Created PostgreSQL database schema with optimized queries for product search and filtering
Built admin dashboard for inventory management and sales analytics
Integrated Stripe payment gateway with webhook handling for transaction verification

name: React Analytics Dashboard
description: Real-time analytics dashboard for business metrics visualization with interactive charts, filters, and data export.
bullets: Built responsive React dashboard with 15+ chart types using Recharts library
Implemented Redux state management for efficient data flow and component communication
Created dynamic filtering system with real-time data updates via WebSocket integration
Designed mobile-first UI with Tailwind CSS achieving 95+ Lighthouse score
Developed data export features (CSV, PDF) with custom formatting and scheduling

name: ML Recommendation Engine
description: Collaborative filtering recommendation system using matrix factorization to deliver personalized product suggestions.
bullets: Implemented collaborative filtering with matrix factorization achieving 0.82 RMSE on test set
Built feature engineering pipeline to process 1M+ user interactions efficiently
Created FastAPI endpoint for real-time recommendations with <100ms response time
Developed offline batch processing for generating daily recommendation updates
Set up monitoring dashboard tracking model performance and inference latency metrics

name: Real-time Chat Application
description: Scalable chat platform with real-time messaging, user presence, message history, and file sharing capabilities.
bullets: Designed WebSocket-based architecture supporting 10K+ concurrent connections
Implemented message persistence in PostgreSQL with efficient indexing for history queries
Built React UI with optimistic updates and typing indicators for smooth UX
Created Redis pub/sub layer for inter-service communication and presence tracking
Developed file upload system with virus scanning and storage optimization

name: ETL Data Pipeline
description: Automated ETL workflow for extracting data from multiple sources, transforming it, and loading into centralized warehouse.
bullets: Designed Airflow DAGs for orchestrating 20+ data pipelines with SLA monitoring
Implemented incremental loading strategy reducing processing time by 70%
Created data quality checks and validation framework catching anomalies early
Built monitoring alerts for pipeline failures with automatic retry logic
Developed documentation and runbooks for operations team troubleshooting

name: Mobile App - React Native
description: Cross-platform mobile application for iOS and Android with offline support and push notifications.
bullets: Developed React Native app deployed to App Store and Google Play with 50K+ downloads
Implemented Firebase Cloud Messaging for push notifications and in-app messaging
Created offline-first architecture with local SQLite database and sync logic
Built custom gesture handlers and animations for fluid mobile UX
Set up CI/CD pipeline for automated testing and app store deployment

name: GraphQL API Gateway
description: GraphQL gateway aggregating multiple backend services with caching, subscriptions, and federation support.
bullets: Built Apollo Server GraphQL API with dataloader pattern for N+1 query prevention
Implemented field-level caching reducing downstream API calls by 65%
Created subscription system for real-time data updates using WebSockets
Designed schema stitching to federate microservices transparently
Added request validation and rate limiting middleware for security

name: Docker & Kubernetes Deployment
description: Containerized microservices infrastructure with Kubernetes orchestration, auto-scaling, and zero-downtime deployments.
bullets: Created multi-stage Dockerfiles reducing image size by 80% while maintaining functionality
Designed Kubernetes manifests for high-availability deployment across 3 availability zones
Implemented Helm charts for parameterized deployments across staging and production
Set up horizontal pod autoscaling based on CPU and custom metrics
Configured health checks and rolling updates ensuring zero-downtime deployments

name: Python CLI Tool Suite
description: Production-grade command-line tools for data processing, automation, and developer productivity.
bullets: Built CLI with Click framework supporting 15+ commands with hierarchical subcommands
Created rich terminal output with tables, progress bars, and color coding using Rich library
Implemented comprehensive test suite with 90%+ code coverage using Pytest
Packaged tool for PyPI distribution with automated versioning and changelog generation
Added bash/zsh completion scripts and extensive help documentation

name: PostgreSQL Query Optimization
description: Performance optimization project including indexing strategies, query tuning, and vacuum analysis.
bullets: Analyzed query execution plans with EXPLAIN identifying full table scans on critical queries
Designed multi-column indexes and partial indexes reducing query time by 85%
Implemented query parameterization and connection pooling (PgBouncer) for throughput increase
Created monitoring dashboards tracking table bloat and vacuum efficiency metrics
Documented indexing strategy and query optimization patterns for team reference

name: Microservices with Service Discovery
description: Distributed microservices platform with automatic service discovery, inter-service communication, and circuit breaker patterns.
bullets: Designed 8 independent microservices with clear domain boundaries and async communication
Implemented Consul service discovery with health checks and DNS-based service routing
Built gRPC services for low-latency inter-service communication reducing overhead by 60%
Created circuit breaker implementation to prevent cascade failures across services
Developed comprehensive API documentation and Postman collections for service testing

name: CI/CD Pipeline & Testing Framework
description: Comprehensive testing framework and continuous integration pipeline ensuring code quality and reliable deployments.
bullets: Created unit tests, integration tests, and end-to-end tests with 85%+ coverage across codebase
Designed GitHub Actions workflows for automated testing on every PR and scheduled runs
Implemented database schema versioning with automated migrations in CI/CD pipeline
Built performance benchmarking suite tracking regression and optimization gains over time
Set up automated security scanning (SAST/DAST) and dependency vulnerability checks

name: NLP Text Classification Model
description: Fine-tuned BERT model for multi-class text classification achieving state-of-the-art accuracy on domain-specific data.
bullets: Fine-tuned BERT model on 50K labeled examples achieving 94% F1-score on test set
Implemented data augmentation and active learning to maximize label efficiency
Built FastAPI endpoint for inference with batch processing and caching for 10x throughput
Created visualization dashboards showing model confidence scores and error analysis
Deployed model with A/B testing framework comparing against baseline classifier
